name: GeometryAttributeFilter
summary: If an object passes the geometry TYPE filter, then the geometry ATTRIBUTE filter is applied.

enum_values.name: WireCurve
enum_values.summary: 3d wire curve If you want to accept only wire or edge curves, then specify wire_curve or edge_curve, otherwise both wire and edge curves will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: EdgeCurve
enum_values.summary: 3d curve of a surface edge If you want to accept only wire or edge curves, then specify wire_curve or edge_curve, otherwise both wire and edge curves will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: ClosedCurve
enum_values.summary: Closed Curves and Edges are acceptable If you want to accept only closed or open curves, then specify either closed_curve or open_curve. Otherwise both closed and open curves will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: OpenCurve
enum_values.summary: Open Curves and Edges are acceptable If you want to accept only closed or open curves, then specify either closed_curve or open_curve. Otherwise both closed and open curves will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: SeamEdge
enum_values.summary: seam edges are acceptable attributes of acceptable trimming edge objects (associated with an ON_BrepTrim). If none of these attributes are explicitly specified, then any kind of trimming edge will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: ManifoldEdge
enum_values.summary: edges with 2 different surfaces pass attributes of acceptable trimming edge objects (associated with an ON_BrepTrim). If none of these attributes are explicitly specified, then any kind of trimming edge will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: NonmanifoldEdge
enum_values.summary: edges with 3 or more surfaces pass attributes of acceptable trimming edge objects (associated with an ON_BrepTrim). If none of these attributes are explicitly specified, then any kind of trimming edge will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: MatedEdge
enum_values.summary: any mated edge passes attributes of acceptable trimming edge objects (associated with an ON_BrepTrim). If none of these attributes are explicitly specified, then any kind of trimming edge will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: SurfaceBoundaryEdge
enum_values.summary: boundary edges on surface sides pass attributes of acceptable trimming edge objects (associated with an ON_BrepTrim). If none of these attributes are explicitly specified, then any kind of trimming edge will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: TrimmingBoundaryEdge
enum_values.summary: boundary edges that trim a surface pass attributes of acceptable trimming edge objects (associated with an ON_BrepTrim). If none of these attributes are explicitly specified, then any kind of trimming edge will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: BoundaryEdge
enum_values.summary: ant boundary edge passes attributes of acceptable trimming edge objects (associated with an ON_BrepTrim). If none of these attributes are explicitly specified, then any kind of trimming edge will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: ClosedSurface
enum_values.summary: If you want to accept only closed or open surfaces, then specify either closed_surface or open_surface. Otherwise both closed and open surfaces will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: OpenSurface
enum_values.summary: If you want to accept only closed or open surfaces, then specify either closed_surface or open_surface. Otherwise both closed and open surfaces will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: TrimmedSurface
enum_values.summary: If you want to accept only trimmed or untrimmed surfaces, then specify either trimmed_surface or untrimmed_surface. Otherwise both trimmed and untrimmed surfaces will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: UntrimmedSurface
enum_values.summary: If you want to accept only trimmed or untrimmed surfaces, then specify either trimmed_surface or untrimmed_surface. Otherwise both trimmed and untrimmed surfaces will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: SubSurface
enum_values.summary: If you want to accept only sub-surfaces of (multi-surface) polysurface, then specify sub_surface. If you do not want to accept sub-surfaces, then specify top_surface. Otherwise sub-surfaces and top surfaces will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: TopSurface
enum_values.summary: If you want to accept only sub-surfaces of (multi-surface) polysurface, then specify sub_surface. If you do not want to accept sub-surfaces, then specify top_surface. Otherwise sub-surfaces and top surfaces will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: ManifoldPolysrf
enum_values.summary: If you want to accept only manifold or non-manifold polysurfaces, then specify manifold_polysrf or nonmanifold_polysrf. Otherwise both manifold and non-manifold polysurfaces will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: NonmanifoldPolysrf
enum_values.summary: If you want to accept only manifold or non-manifold polysurfaces, then specify manifold_polysrf or nonmanifold_polysrf. Otherwise both manifold and non-manifold polysurfaces will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: ClosedPolysrf
enum_values.summary: If you want to accept only closed or open polysurfaces, then specify either closed_polysrf or open_polysrf. Otherwise both closed and open polysurfaces will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: OpenPolysrf
enum_values.summary: If you want to accept only closed or open polysurfaces, then specify either closed_polysrf or open_polysrf. Otherwise both closed and open polysurfaces will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: ClosedMesh
enum_values.summary: If you want to accept only closed or open meshes, then specify either closed_mesh or open_mesh. Otherwise both closed and open meshes will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: OpenMesh
enum_values.summary: If you want to accept only closed or open meshes, then specify either closed_mesh or open_mesh. Otherwise both closed and open meshes will pass the attribute filter.

enum_values.name: BoundaryInnerLoop
enum_values.summary: all trimming edges are boundary edges.

enum_values.name: MatedInnerLoop
enum_values.summary: all trimming edges are mated.

enum_values.name: InnerLoop
enum_values.summary: any inner loop is acceptable.

enum_values.name: BoundaryOuterLoop
enum_values.summary: all trimming edges are boundary edges.

enum_values.name: MatedOuterLoop
enum_values.summary: all trimming edges are mated.

enum_values.name: OuterLoop
enum_values.summary: any outer loop is acceptable.

enum_values.name: SpecialLoop
enum_values.summary: slit, curve-on-surface, point-on-surface, etc.
